Label: Moderate Institutional Trust
Description: This class shows a strong tendency toward mid-to-high trust categories (4 and 5) across most institutions, with particularly high trust in the president, armed forces, and supreme court.

Label: High Institutional Trust
Description: This class is characterized by very high probabilities of selecting Category 7 across nearly all institutions, most notably for the president (0.82), public ministry (0.74), and armed forces (0.72).

Label: Strong Institutional Trust
Description: This class shows a strong lean toward higher trust categories (5, 6, and 7) across most institutions, with the highest probabilities concentrated in the president, armed forces, and supreme court.

Label: Generalized Institutional Distrust
Description: This class is characterized by a high probability of selecting Category 1 across all institutions, most notably for political parties (0.85) and police (0.76).

Label: Selective Executive and Military Trust
Description: This class is characterized by high distrust of political parties and police, contrasted with relatively high trust in the president and armed forces.
